# Documentation Style

All documentation style guides live in `documentation/documentation-style-guides/`.

## How to Find the Right Guide

Browse `documentation/documentation-style-guides/` — each file covers a specific documentation concern:

```
documentation/documentation-style-guides/
  MERMAID-DIAGRAMS-STYLE-GUIDE.md
  (future style guides go here)
```

When writing or updating documentation:

1. Navigate to `documentation/documentation-style-guides/` and find the guide relevant to what you're creating.
2. Read the full guide and follow every convention listed there.
